title: All the Rakai drama from MrBeast’s $1,000,000 streamer event you need to know
summary_full: MrBeast's million-dollar streamer challenge saw YourRAGE claim the top prize. However, contestant Rakai's on-stage outburst after elimination and subsequent online dispute with El Rubius fans created significant drama. Security was called to remove Rakai. This controversy, alongside the competition, made the event highly memorable for viewers. The incident highlighted the intense pressure faced by participants.
